rulings.Case Title: JULES RADCLIFFE et al VS. PHUONG PHAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Phuong Pham And Tp Pham, Llc'S Motion To Quash Subpoenas To Third Party Entities And Stay Depositions, And For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 6, 2015, line 1. Defendants Phuong Pham And Tp PhamS' Motion To Quash Subpoenas To Third Party Entities And Stay Depositions, And For Protective Order is DENIED. The testimony and records sought by Plaintiffs' subpoenas are directly relevant to Defendant Pham's testimony that she was unable to complete rehabilitation work due to financial constraints. Also failed to file a separate statement and meet and confer prior to filing this motion, as required by CRC 3.1345(a) (5), and CCP 2025.420, which apply to this motion. Naser v. Lakeridge Athletic Club (2014) 227 Cal.App.4th 571, 577. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED that the depositions and document productions sought by these subpoenas must be completed no later than February 12, 2015, unless otherwise stipulated by the parties or ordered by the Court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MOHSIN AHMMED VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Mohsin Ahmmed'S Motion To Compel Further Responses
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 6, 2015, line 2. Plaintiff Mohsin Ahmmed'S Motion To Compel Further Responses is granted in part and denied in part as follows: 1) Defendant is to provide an amended response without objections or equivocation to the Request for Production, Set Two, pursuant to C.C.P. §2031.210 within ten (10) days. See Weil & Brown, et al., CAL. PRAC. GUIDE: CIV PROBEFORE TRIAL (The Rutter Group 2014) §§8:1469 - 1470 as to content. 2) All objections to the requests are overruled except for previous objections to specific documents based upon privilege which have been identified previously in a privilege log. 3) As to any specific documents which defendant previously identified and asserted were produced but were not actually received by plaintiff, the denial of the motion is without prejudice to bring a renewed motion to produce those specifically identified documents. Except as otherwise provided here, the motion is denied with respect to further responses. 4) Request for Sanctions by both parties is denied. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CORY NICOLAI VS. FRANK WINDOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alt Summ Adj
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 6, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANT CURTIS YARVIN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is GRANTED. Moving party shifted the burden and opposing party failed to present admissible evidence to create a triable issue of fact. Opposing party "does not dispute the moving party's Separate Statement of Undisputed Facts." Kraemer v. Kraemer (1959) 167 Cal.App.2d 291 is on point as to the issues of co-tenancy and notice of ouster. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CASA DE LA RAZA, INC VS. ANGEL AMAYA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Answers, Without Objections To Special Interrogatories Set No. 1; Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer Set No. 1; Form Interrogatories-General Set No. 1; Request For Admissions, Set No. 1- Request For Production Of Documents Set One Propounded On Angel Maya; Request For Admissions Set One Propounded On Angel Maya To Be Deemed Admitted; Award For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 6, 2015, line 7. PLAINTIFF CASA DE LA RAZA'S MOTION To Compel Answers, Without Objections To Special Interrogatories Set No. 1; Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer Set No. 1; Form Interrogatories-General Set No. 1; Request For Admissions, Set No. 1- Request For Production Of Documents Set One Propounded On Angel Maya; Request For Admissions Set One Propounded On Angel Maya To Be Deemed Admitted; Award For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED subject to opposition. Angel Amaya shall provide responses to Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories-UD, Form Interrogatories' -General and Request for Production within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Requests for Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $860. = (501/REQ)
